excluded_concurrent_work.note: This shared working tree had multiple concurrent CDR agents active during this run (issues #43, #51, #56, #41, #53). engine/rpc/server.go and engine/rpc/search_candidates_test.go had uncommitted WIP from a concurrent issue #43 agent (Server.btreeStore/btreeRootNodeID -> pathIndex *btree.Tree rename, PutSegment path-indexing, GetFile path lookup). To avoid bundling unrelated in-flight work into this commit, this run bypassed the shared working tree/index entirely for the final artifact: content for all 5 touched files was reconstructed from `git show HEAD:<path>` (guaranteed-clean, already-committed base) plus this subtask's specific edits only, applied in /tmp/build47/, then assembled into a git tree via a private GIT_INDEX_FILE (git read-tree HEAD + git update-index --cacheinfo + git write-tree), never touching the shared repo index or working tree files.

downstream_consumers: engine/rpc/server.go SearchCandidates handler (adds validateQueryTermCount call before candidatePool)
docs/LLD/query-agent.md and docs/LLD/btree.md Known risks sections (doc-only correction, cross-referenced)
risk: low - purely additive validation + dedup in one existing call path; no signature changes to exported PrefixScan or candidatePool; no changes to Server struct fields or NewServer signature (avoided touching the concurrently-being-refactored btreeStore/pathIndex fields, only referencing them as they exist at HEAD).
